LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS FISHER REALTOR, INC AND CLARA KATES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 18, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 9, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

UNLAWFUL DETAINER DEPT. 501: DEFENDANTS FISHER REALTOR, INC AND CLARA KATES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE/ATTACH A CONTRACT WITH THE MOVING DEFENDANTS; TO ALLEGE FRAUD WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY AND TO ALLEGE FACTS GIVING RISE TO FIDUCIARY DUTY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FISHER REALTOR, INC KATES, CLARA J JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS FISHER REALTOR, INC. AND CLARA KATES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 4TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION. AFTER BEING GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO ALLEGE A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP AND A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP WITH THE MOVING DEFENDANTS, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FAILS TO ALLEGE FACTS RE: BREACH OF CONTRACTUAL WARRANTY AND BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION AS IT IS NOT ALLEGED AGAINST THE MOVING DEFENDANTS. DEMURRER AS TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leonard Watkins, of Genser & Watkins, (510-237-6916), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Fisher Realtor, Inc. and Clara J. Kates, Defendants and moving parties.
Sean A. Nicholson, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-586-5515), for Jeffrey Rocca, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court hears arguments on the demurrer as to the 9th cause of action. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling except for ruling on the Demurrer as to the 9th cause of action, as follows: DEFENDANTs FISHER REALTOR, INC. and CLARA KATES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE to amend as to the 4th and 8th causes of action. After being given an opportunity to allege a contractual relationship and a fiduciary relationship with the moving defendants, plaintiff failed to do so. First Amended Complaint fails to allege facts re: breach of contractual warranty and breach of fiduciary duty. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to the first cause of action as it is not alleged against the moving defendants. Demurrer as to the 9th cause of action is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
